name: Mystical Riddles: Ghostly Park Collector's Edition
short_description: What is the price of eternal life? Stop the atrocious ritual! Don't let evil prevail! The soul hunter will spare no one. Can you master the willpower to win?
detailed_description:
A gripping detective series filled with mystery and riddles awaits you! You will investigate the deaths of people under strange circumstances. A place once filled with fun and laughter now horrifies its visitors. They say the Amusement Park is haunted, but where's the proof? Then, a woman, Allison, finds you. She seeks help to uncover what happened to her beloved sister. Could her sister be another victim of the ghosts as well? Unravel the tangled web of enigmas and piece the puzzle together. Evil spirits are on the loose! Darkness is descending upon the city, and only you can stop it. Don't be afraid of the dark side, for it won't be able to consume you. Remember, the fate of many restless souls rests in your hands! Challenge your investigative skills in this spectacular new Hidden-Object Puzzle Adventure!

This Collector's Edition includes:

🧩 A variety of achievements!
Conduct your own investigation by solving intricate puzzles, solving complex riddles and playing various mini-games. You need to solve the most important mystery by searching various places, collecting things and interviewing passers-by. Unlock all the achievements to highlight your success!

🧩 Over 100 enigmatic puzzles!
Search and find hidden objects, decipher clues, find the difference and piece together the mystery to progress! You might think that some mysteries are not meant to be solved, but you can do it, can't you?

🧩 Collectible items!
This exciting new edition of the mystery story is filled with various clues and mysterious items that you need to find in order to advance your investigation! Find the collectibles at each crime scene and find the hidden objects. You'll have to be a very careful detective to collect the entire collection!

supported_languages:
English*, French*, German*, Russian
*languages with full audio support
